_comment: Calibration spec for the Oliver HTTYD lamp video. The real hook is a stranger destroying the maker's handmade dragon lamp at an outdoor market stall. We use required_any groups so the canary accepts the model's word choice (dropped / broken / smashed / thrown / on the ground / on the floor) — gemini-2.5-flash uses 'dropped' and 'broken'; other models say 'smashed' or 'thrown'. The mechanic must still resolve to public disrespect of an underdog maker.
_authoring_note: If you change synonyms here, also run tests/test_evaluator.py::test_shipped_oliver_fixture_matches_a_good_report and tests/test_evaluator.py::test_shipped_oliver_fixture_passes_with_dropped_and_broken — they protect this fixture against drift.
mechanic_any: public disrespect of a handmade seller
